name: Weave by W&B (LLM App Tracing & Evaluation)
pricing_notes: Free tier (100GB storage); Weights & Biases commercial plans

performance.notes: Async trace logging; minimal impact on LLM call latency

agent_readiness.notes: W&B's LLM observability and evaluation platform. weave.init('project'). @weave.op() traces function calls automatically. Auto-instrumentation for OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, LangChain, LlamaIndex. Datasets and evaluations: define scorers, run evals, compare models. Trace viewer with token counts, latency, costs. Playground for prompt comparison. TypeScript SDK. Part of W&B ecosystem (integrates with wandb training runs). Competes with Langsmith (LangChain), Langfuse (open-source), Braintrust.

gotchas: Part of W&B — costs accumulate at scale on W&B plans
W&B account required (no fully self-hosted option)
best_when: Teams already using W&B for ML training who want LLM tracing
LLM apps needing trace + evaluation + dataset management together
Projects needing multi-model comparison via playground
Production LLM monitoring with cost tracking
avoid_when: Simple logging without evaluation needs (logfire simpler)
summary: Weave by W&B provides LLM app tracing, evaluation, and dataset management. @weave.op() decorator auto-traces function calls. Auto-instrumentation for OpenAI, Anthropic, LangChain. Evaluation framework for running scorers across datasets. Playground for model comparison. Integrates with W&B ML training ecosystem. Best for teams already on W&B wanting LLM observability + evaluation in one platform.
